summary: A vertical produced clip shown in tight close-up at night, showing a person's lower body with a chain restraint around the ankles over a striped track pant, holding papers, with an officer's leg beside them and blurred figures and luggage in the background. Faces are not shown.

script.scene: A close-up of a person's legs with an ankle chain restraint, holding papers, beside an officer's leg at night.
The same close-up continues with slight movement and blurred background figures.
